D_norm_bound_derivation: max(W_upper, Lambda_I); no further rounded arithmetic
K_gap_cert_derivation: -Lambda_I I <= D <= W_exact I <= W_upper I; K_gap_cert is the least binary64 not below exact_binary64(W_upper)+Lambda_I
edge_weight_semantics: archived binary64 values interpreted as exact dyadic rationals

unresolved_probe_strategy.coverage_rule: every skipped interval is unresolved unless B_k from its actual length is positive
unresolved_probe_strategy.name: exponential_mark_and_probe
